_comment: Generic defaults apply to any brand. Add your own brand under 'brands', keyed by root domain, and pass --url when generating so the CLI can auto-fill the audience/hashtag for that brand. The entries below are working examples, not required defaults, keep, edit, or delete them freely.

defaults._llm_models_comment: Per-provider default model, used when --generate runs with --provider X and no --model override is given. Add/edit entries freely; unknown providers fall back to llm.py's built-in default for that provider.

edstellar.com.name: Edstellar
edstellar.com.description: Global corporate training company that partners with enterprises to deliver high-impact training solutions for modern teams
edstellar.com.audience: L&Ds, HRs, and decision-makers in the organization
edstellar.com._platform_audience_overrides_comment: Optional. Keyed by CLI --platform alias or template key. Falls back to 'audience' above for any platform not listed here. Entirely optional, delete this whole map if you don't need per-platform overrides.

platform_audience_overrides.livejournal: community members and personal-development readers browsing a personal blog, not a corporate audience

invensislearning.com.name: Invensis Learning
invensislearning.com.description: Global professional training and certification provider empowering individuals and organizations with in-demand skills across project management, IT service management, agile, cybersecurity, and more

example-creator.com._comment: Example creator/personal-brand entry. `market: creator` switches templates that consume the market register to an individual first-person voice. The placeholder name below is deliberately unusable as a real byline, replace every [BRACKETED] field with a real creator's details (or delete this entry) before generating anything you intend to publish.
example-creator.com.name: [YOUR NAME - Example Creator]
example-creator.com.description: Independent consultant and content creator sharing practical advice from real client work (replace with the creator's actual positioning)
example-creator.com.audience: early-to-mid-career professionals working on their own skills growth
